creator: bill@duchess.wagill.com
text:
I am attempting to install FreeBSD 2.1.5 from CD-ROM.

	When I get to the part in the installation where it asks to choose an
	installation media, I choose "1 - CDROM" , and it comes back with "no
	CD-ROM devices found".

	I have a Mistumi CD-ROM drive (ISA), and this same CD-ROM drive worked just
	fine when installing FreeBSD 2.1 from CD-ROM a few weeks ago.

	Please help.  Thank you.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Every time I attempt to install 2.1.5 from CD-ROM.
